texto: A vida não é fácil para nenhum de nós. Temos que ter persistência e, acima de tudo, confiança em nós mesmos.
explicacao: Marie Curie, cientista pioneira, fala da dificuldade da vida e da necessidade de persistência e autoconfiança. Contexto: trajetória marcada por preconceito de gênero e trabalho árduo na pesquisa. Inspira mulheres e pesquisadores a não desistir.

texto: Life is not easy for any of us. But what of that? We must have perseverance and above all confidence in ourselves. We must believe that we are gifted for something and that this thing at whatever cost must be attained.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Marie Curie que provoca sentido da existência e experiência vivida. Ao questionar “Life is not easy for any of us. But what of that? texto: All my mind was centered on my studies, which, especially at the beginning, were difficult. In fact, I was insufficiently prepared to follow the physical science course at the Sorbonne, for, despite all my efforts, I had not succeeded in acquiring in Poland a preparation as complete as that of the French students following the same course.
